name: Vicki Lawrence
blurb: Discovered at 18 for the Burnett show; creator of 'Mama'.
bio: Vicki Lawrence is an American actress and comedian who joined The Carol Burnett Show as a teenager and grew into a key ensemble player, originating the character Thelma 'Mama' Harper, which spun off into the sitcom Mama's Family.

flags.note: Added 2026-06-17 discovery pass (expanded comedy-bit scope): minimum profile = bio + headshot + one verified clip; deepen via the audit game.
